name: google-workspace
title: Google Workspace
description: Typed Gmail v1, Calendar v3, Drive v3, and agent-desktop OAuth operations with previews, confirmations, retries, and structured evidence.
whenToUse: Automate Gmail, Google Calendar, or Google Drive through approved user OAuth
Inspect Google Workspace account scopes and identity
Transfer Drive content or manage Workspace resources with explicit safety previews
